meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solving No Project Ideas with AI Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project ideas. Master high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver premium value to your clients fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' trap is a failure of systemization, not creativity. By building modular, AI-driven user onboarding flows, you transform generic CRUD apps into high-value, personalized experiences. This approach provides a repeatable technical framework that solves client retention issues while positioning you as a high-tier product engineer.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. Another client request has landed—a vague demand for a 'SaaS platform'—and you’re paralyzed by the lack of a compelling hook. The silence of the IDE is where most freelancers lose their edge, caught between the desire to build and the absence of a meaningful direction. 

But the breakthrough isn't in finding a new idea; it’s in mastering the delivery. By weaponizing user onboarding, you turn any functional prototype into a sophisticated, high-conversion product. This tutorial provides the blueprint to convert technical debt into an automated, high-impact onboarding engine that keeps users hooked from the first second.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Persona
steps.description: Before writing code, map the user's 'Aha!' moment. We use AI to define the shortest path to value for a specific niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Product Architect. Generate a 3-step 'Aha' moment flow for a B2B project management tool that reduces initial setup time by 50%.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a user_journey.md file outlining the 3-step onboarding flow for the current project scope.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Implement a robust state machine to track onboarding progress, ensuring the UI stays in sync with the user's status.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a TypeScript state machine for a 5-step onboarding process. Include states for: welcome, profile_setup, preference_selection, tutorial_overlay, and completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a src/lib/onboardingState.ts file using the generated state machine schema.'

steps.title: Architect the Dynamic Progress UI
steps.description: Build a modular progress component that updates in real-time as users complete tasks, keeping them visually engaged.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React component using Tailwind CSS that displays a progress bar and a dynamic completion checklist based on the state machine.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create components/OnboardingProgress.tsx and integrate it into the main layout.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Contextual Triggers
steps.description: Use AI-driven hooks to trigger onboarding tips based on user behavior rather than static timers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a hook 'useOnboardingTrigger' that evaluates user interaction history and suggests the next onboarding step contextually.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement hooks/useOnboardingTrigger.ts and connect it to the global state.'

steps.title: Finalize and Stress-Test the Flow
steps.description: Ensure the system is resilient to user navigation (refreshes, back buttons) using persistent storage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add local storage persistence to the onboarding state machine to ensure progress is saved across sessions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Update src/lib/onboardingState.ts to support localStorage persistence and verify the flow.'

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a decoupled micro-frontend; it allows you to plug it into any client project without refactoring the core logic.
Use AI to generate 'micro-copy' for your onboarding steps that focuses on benefits rather than features.
Implement a 'skip' function that logs why users skipped; this data is pure gold for your next client pitch.
Use CSS variables for your onboarding UI so you can theme the entire experience for different clients in seconds.
Always include a 'magic link' option in the onboarding flow to bypass manual sign-ups and reduce friction by 80%.
content.next_steps: After completing this, package your onboarding component as a reusable NPM library or a template in your Antigravity dashboard to speed up future client builds.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the architecture to turn any basic app into a premium, high-retention product. Stop guessing what to build and start building systems that win. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
